pages.title: Building the Network
pages.text: To use entropy effectively, you need to transport it from your pyramid to your machines. This requires a player-bound network.

pages.title: Entropy Reservoir
pages.text: Stores entropy generated by your pyramid. Only accepts entropy from pyramids with the same owner UUID. Max capacity: 50,000 Entropy.

pages.title: Entropy Cable
pages.text: Transports entropy between machines. Transfers up to 50 Entropy per tick. CRITICAL: Cables only connect blocks with matching owner UUID - networks are player-specific!

pages.title: Network Rules
pages.text: Global Rules:$(br)- Entropy decays 1% per minute if Pyramid is inactive$(br)- Networks cannot mix between players$(br)- Cables never store energy$(br)- Machines must check owner UUID before operating$(br)$()This ensures multiplayer fairness and prevents exploits.
